untranslatable_reason: Signal requires detection of 'information asymmetry' and 'material information revealed to limited audience' — neither identifiable via technical indicators alone. Requires external data feeds (news sentiment, regulatory calendars, earnings call timing, Google Trends). Volume percentile threshold (50th) approximated as vol_ratio_20 >= 1.0. Price directional bias (>0.5 std dev) approximated as returns magnitude crossing 0.5%. Information decay (72 hours, <4 hours since origin) and information becoming public (news spike detection) cannot be expressed with allowed technical indicators.
translation_notes: Converted CONTEXT_DEPENDENT direction into separate entry_long and entry_short conditions. Used vol_ratio_20 as proxy for volume exceeding 50th percentile. Used returns magnitude as proxy for directional price bias (>0.5 std dev approximated as >0.5% return). 72-hour hold_days_max represents information decay window. Exit on volume normalization (vol_ratio_20 < 0.9) represents return to baseline. This translation assumes external event detection and requires supplementary rule layers for information-specific triggers.
